title_en: IGN Live 2026 Just Revealed Its Massive Playable Games Lineup, Featuring Forza Horizon 6, 007 First Light and Over 170 Packed Stations.
summary_en: IGN Live 2026 has revealed its full lineup of over 40 playable games, including Forza Horizon 6 and 007: First Light. Here is every title you can play.
body_en:
IGN Live is right around the corner, and now the full lineup of playable games has been revealed.
Taking place at the Magic Box Box in downtown Los Angeles, IGN Live is a celebration of everything fans love in games, movies, TV, comics, collectibles, and more. The show will feature thousands of giveaways, exclusive trailers, live celebrity interviews, playable games, and more.
Tickets are on sale now , and attendees can expect to find more than 170 gaming stations with tons of games including:
Games will be playable on a variety or of PCs and consoles including:
IGN Live will also include a variety of arcade games and pinball machines featuring Pokémon, X-Men, Star Wars: Fall of the Empire, Dungeons & Dragons, King Kong, and Transformers.
Beyond playable games, this year's massive IGN Live lineup includes the casts of major movies and TV shows like Jackass and Avatar: The Last Airbender, exclusive looks at games like CONTROL Resonant and Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, trailers and clips from Supergirl, PowerWash Simulator, and Diablo Immortal, special panels from Xbox, Webtoon, and Poppy Playtime, appearances by tons of celebrities, and even an advanced screening of the new Adventure Time spinoff series .
IGN Live 2025 featured tons of cool reveals, including the cast of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 premiering the first 10 minutes of their documentary, The Last of Us creative team discussing how they crafted Season 2’s most crucial episodes, Ewan McGregor talking about how the Long Way Docuseries literally changed his life, Invincible VS creators on the inspirations behind the game and so much more .
